title: Teleshopping

title: Zeher
subTitle: Siddharth, a police officer who is soon to be divorced, has an affair with Anna. Later, when his girlfriend is found dead, he sets out to solve the murder case with his former wife Sonia.

title: Anokha Jaanwar
subTitle: Karthik develops a psychological disorder after watching his father commit suicide. Later, he murders his abusive mother but ends up losing his lover.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Jungle: The Battleground
subTitle: A gang leader meets a brave man, who eventually joins his gang. However, the new member of the gang has a troubled past.

title: Googly
subTitle: Sharath leads a carefree life until he meets Swathi at a college event. A friendship turns into a mutual attraction, but a small misunderstanding causes them to part ways.

title: Mahaveer No.1
subTitle: A young orphan, White, challenges the sly Adikesavalu for control of the Ongole market and his daughter. Their fight unearths a past of greed, injustice and a simmering quest for revenge.

title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
subTitle: The kingdom of Rathanpur is forced to face the wrath of Bhairav Singh, who unceremoniously usurps their land. They later find respite when Gabbar Singh, a brave policeman, takes on their oppressor.
Sathya, a young policeman, curses his luck when he gets posted in a control room. However, his life takes an unusual turn after the 100th call he overhears.

title: Hit List
subTitle: Vijay's life turns into a living hell when a mysterious masked figure abducts his family. Forced into a dark world of violence, he becomes an unwilling assassin, targeting the kidnapper's enemies.

title: Pitaah
subTitle: Rudra, a poor labourer, works in a rural village ruled by a tyrannical Thakur Avadh Narayan Singh. However, he sets out to seek justice to punish the Thakur's sons who raped his minor daughter.

title: Pitaah

title: Hanuman
subTitle: A mischievous Hanuman grows up to become a heroic being who fights all evil creatures and helps Lord Rama in rescuing Sita from Lanka.

title: Tele Shopping
subTitle: The host provides the features and specifications of a wide range of products which can be purchased from the comforts of one's home.

title: Heeralal Pannalal
subTitle: Heeralal and Pannalal are twins who face humorous situations when they are mistaken for another set of twins with the same name. Unaware of their namesakes, they set out on a journey of love and adventure.

title: Krishna Sudama
subTitle: Sudama, Lord Krishna's childhood friend, is very poor. After a gap of many years, Sudama wants to meet Lord Krishna but faces many obstacles in reuniting with his friend.

title: Sirivennela
subTitle: A paranormal investigator encounters an enraged poltergeist, the spirit of a young child burdened by a shadowy and tragic history.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Mardini
subTitle: After getting posted in Chikmagalur for a political agenda duty, a female police officer faces various challenges and handles dangers with the help of her trained dog.

title: Mega Crocodile
subTitle: A researcher is commissioned to search for a missing person on the Hell Island full of crocodiles but soon find themselves endangered when giant crocodiles begin threatening their lives.

title: International Rowdy
subTitle: Love invents a lethal drug and gives it to terrorist outfits, who use it to kill Indian officials in Kuala Lumpur. When RAW officers find a love emblem tattoo on his neck, they start investigating.

title: State of Siege: Temple Attack
subTitle: Armed with state-of-the-art equipment and a brilliant plan, National Security Guard commandos risk their lives to save innocent people caught in a terrorist attack on a temple in Gujarat.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.

title: Drona
subTitle: Aditya is an orphaned and lonely young man. He soon learns that he belongs to a family of ancestral warriors who guard a mystic source of cosmic energy, and he must now take up his responsibilities.

title: Vanguard
subTitle: Qin, an accountant living in the UK, is targeted by the leader of a terrorist organisation. His only hope for survival is Vanguard, an elite security company.

title: The Return of Kaalia
subTitle: A man aspiring to get his dream job falls in love with a television reporter. However, his life takes a turn when his sister is burned alive for dowry and he decides to kill all men who harass women.

title: Akbar Birbal
subTitle: Clever Birbal aids Emperor Akbar in witty adventures, solving puzzles and delivering justice across Mughal India, unfolding tales of wisdom and humor.

title: Pandav - The Punch
subTitle: Abandoned at birth, Rudhran is brought back home by his father. Soon, he strives to rescue a blind girl from the clutches of evil.

title: I
subTitle: A bodybuilder and successful model plans revenge after his enemies inject him with a substance that deforms his body.

title: Haathkadi
subTitle: ACP Suraj, an honest policeman, swears revenge on culprits when his innocent brother is killed. However, he is soon accused of murder and is remanded to prison.

title: Qatil Saya
subTitle: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

title: Jung
subTitle: Arjun Saxena, a police officer, is at odds with his younger brother Ajay, a defence lawyer, because of a client that Ajay believes is innocent of the charges incurred.

title: Snake Cave
subTitle: Shipwrecked survivors reach a mysterious island, only to discover it is home to enormous snakes and ancient creatures, forcing them into a desperate fight for survival.
